metadata.seed: I feel calm most of the time, but sometimes when small things pile up it feels like nothing is going the way it should, and I end up blowing up.

patient.query: I feel calm most of the time, but sometimes when small things pile up it feels like nothing is going the way it should, and I end up blowing up.

automatic_thoughts: nothing is going the way it should

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're doing a great job of maintaining your composure most of the time, but when small things start to pile up, it can feel overwhelming. Let's explore together if there are any thoughts or beliefs that might be contributing to this feeling and see if we can find some alternative ways to cope with stress.

patient.query: I guess I've been feeling a bit overwhelmed lately. It’s like there's this constant weight on my chest, and I just can’t shake it off. Some days, I struggle to even get out of bed. Everything feels harder than it should be.

automatic_thoughts: I can't shake it off
Everything feels harder than it should be
behaviors: struggle to get out of bed

llm_response.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you've been feeling overwhelmed lately. It sounds like there might be a lot on your plate right now, and it can feel heavy at times. Let's see if we can find ways to lighten that load together.

patient.query: Thanks, I appreciate that. It does feel like there’s always something pulling me down. I keep trying to push through, but then I just end up feeling more exhausted and lost. It's frustrating because I know I should be able to handle things better.

automatic_thoughts: I should be able to handle things better

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're dealing with a lot right now. It's understandable to feel overwhelmed and exhausted when we face challenges that seem too much to handle. Let's explore together if there are any thoughts or beliefs that might be making this situation feel even more difficult than it needs to be.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess there are some thoughts that keep creeping in. Like, whenever something goes wrong, I immediately think it’s my fault or that I should’ve seen it coming. It’s like this inner voice constantly telling me I'm not doing enough. It just makes everything feel heavier.

automatic_thoughts: it’s my fault
I should’ve seen it coming
I'm not doing enough

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're having some persistent thoughts that are quite critical of yourself. Let's take a closer look at these thoughts and see if we can find any evidence for or against them, shall we?

patient.query: I mean, yeah, I guess so. I just... I find it hard to see anything good when that voice is shouting. It’s almost like I believe that criticism more than anything else. Sometimes I just feel stuck, you know? Like, even if I wanted to challenge it, I wouldn't know where to start.

automatic_thoughts: I find it hard to see anything good
I believe that criticism more than anything else
I wouldn't know where to start

entailment: Tends to be sensitive to criticism (finding)
Tends to be critical of others (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you might have a tendency to focus on the negative, especially when it comes to your own thoughts and actions. Have you ever considered that this critical voice could be holding you back from seeing the good in situations? Let's explore together if there are ways we can challenge this voice and help you find more balance.

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: Tends to be sensitive to criticism
retrieved_concepts_used.label: entailment

patient.query: I find it hard to see anything good when that voice is shouting. I believe that criticism more than anything else. Sometimes I feel stuck, like I wouldn’t know where to start if I wanted to challenge it. It just feels so ingrained, and it makes everything seem daunting.

automatic_thoughts: I find it hard to see anything good
I believe that criticism more than anything else
I wouldn’t know where to start if I wanted to challenge it
It just feels so ingrained
It makes everything seem daunting

entailment: Tends to be sensitive to criticism (finding)
Tends to be critical of others (finding)
neutral: Tends to appear indifferent to praise or criticism (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you may have a critical inner voice that's difficult to silence. Let's explore together how this voice might be affecting your thoughts and feelings, and if there are ways we can work on challenging it.

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: Tends to be sensitive to criticism
retrieved_concepts_used.label: entailment

patient.query: I have a hard time seeing anything good when that voice is shouting at me. I feel like I just believe that criticism more than anything else. It makes me feel stuck, and I don't even know where to begin if I wanted to challenge it. Everything just feels so daunting.

automatic_thoughts: I have a hard time seeing anything good
I just believe that criticism more than anything else
Everything just feels so daunting

entailment: Tends to be sensitive to criticism (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you've been struggling with a critical inner voice that makes it hard for you to see the positive. Let's explore together if there are alternative ways of thinking about yourself and your experiences that could help lighten the burden.

patient.query: I appreciate you saying that. It’s just hard to imagine thinking differently, you know? That voice feels so familiar, so real. Sometimes I really wonder if I can ever change that perspective or if it’s just who I am. It feels like I’m constantly battling against myself.

automatic_thoughts: hard to imagine thinking differently
that voice feels so familiar, so real
wonder if I can ever change that perspective
if it’s just who I am
constantly battling against myself

neutral: Able to resist dangerous thoughts with difficulty (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you've been struggling with some persistent thoughts that feel difficult to change. Let's explore together if there might be alternative ways of thinking about this situation.

patient.query: That sounds... okay, I guess. But honestly, it’s tough to even picture those alternative ways. I just get lost in the same patterns and feel like I’m going around in circles. Sometimes it’s like there’s this wall I can’t get past, no matter how hard I try.

automatic_thoughts: I just get lost in the same patterns
I feel like I’m going around in circles
there’s this wall I can’t get past

entailment: Unable to find way around a familiar environment (finding)
contradiction: Able to find way around a familiar environment (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're struggling with finding new paths and feeling stuck. Let's explore together if there might be alternative ways to approach this situation that could help you move forward.
